results.name: leori
results.description: Lukka's cat (RIP)

results.name: leotau
results.description: Feline, hoofed mounts of the knights of Bant.

results.name: lesser sliver
results.description: The original sliver design, with a pointy head, split tail, and a big claw. (As opposed to the [humanoid sliver](humanoid-sliver) redesign introduced in M14.)

results.name: leyline
results.description: Cards that start the game on the battlefield if they're in your opening hand.

results.name: lgbtq-plus
results.description: Cards that depict LGBTQ+ characters and representation.

results.name: lhurgoyf
results.description: Cards with power and/or toughness equal to number of cards in the graveyard, or a similar variant. This term is referenced from the Mechanical Color Pie 2017 article by Mark Rosewater. See also [maro](maro) and [warlord](warlord).

results.name: liberator
results.description: Urza's battlethopter

results.name: lich effect
results.description: Effects which turn damage into the loss of cards or permanents. See also [Deal with the devil](/tags/card/deal-with-the-devil)

results.name: life and death
results.description: “Nature’s most raw beauty is the circle: perfect in its continuance, with no break between death and life.”

results.name: life-and-death-trigger-self
results.description: Permanents that have an effect that triggers when they enter the battlefield and when they die.

results.name: life divider
results.description: Effects that make players lose fractions of their life total. See also [set life total](/tags/card/set-life-total) and [life doubler](/tags/card/life-doubler).

results.name: life doubler
results.description: Double someone's life. See also [set life total](/tags/card/set-life-total) and [life divider](/tags/card/life-divider).

results.name: life for cards
results.description: Get cards in exchange for your life (damage causes loss of life).

results.name: lifegain to damage
results.description: Transforms player lifegain into player damage.

results.name: life payment
results.description: Cards that cost life to use; not necessarily with the "pay" keyword.

results.name: life-total-matters-self
results.description: Cards that care about your life total being above or below a certain amount. This doesn’t include cards like Phyrexian Arena that simply want you to be alive.

results.name: liger
results.description: A lion-tiger hybrid.

results.name: lightning bolt redux
results.description: These cards deal 3 damage for {R} under the right circumstances, like Lightning Bolt.

results.name: light of starnheim
results.description: A three-point light in the skies of Kaldheim, resembling parhelions or sun dogs.

results.name: light pillar (weather)
results.description: Streaks of light that pattern the sky surrounding Innistrad's moon, caused by Emrakul's imprisonment.

results.name: li'l giri
results.description: A living Onigiri that comes from a variety of (mostly) Japanese promos.

results.name: liliana headdress
results.description: Liliana's signature headdress, stolen from the Archangel of Tithes.

results.name: lily (avatar)
results.description: A wandering musician who plays the flute.

results.name: lily wu
results.description: Richard Garfield's first wife.
